task_completion.description: Create the three required layers with correct colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layer List panel in LibreCAD should show layers named 'STITCH_LINE' (White/Black), 'SEAM_ALLOWANCE' (Red), and 'FOLD_LINE' (Cyan).

task_completion.description: Draw the main bag body rectangle on the STITCH_LINE layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tall rectangular shape should be visible in the drawing area, drawn in white (or black depending on the background color).

task_completion.description: Apply chamfers to the bottom corners of the bag body
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom-left and bottom-right corners of the main rectangular shape should have diagonal cuts (chamfers) instead of sharp 90-degree angles.

task_completion.description: Create an offset outside the bag body on the SEAM_ALLOWANCE layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: A red outline should completely surround the main bag shape, spaced evenly outside of it, and mirroring its geometry (including the chamfered bottom corners).

task_completion.description: Draw the horizontal hem line on the FOLD_LINE layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cyan horizontal line should be drawn across the upper portion of the bag body, slightly below the top edge.
The LibreCAD window title bar or a save dialog should display the filename 'tote_bag_pattern.dxf'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD GUI to create the pattern
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the LibreCAD interface (toolbars, drawing area, layer list) rather than a text editor or terminal writing DXF code directly.

integrity.description: The agent performed actual drawing operations
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps of the drawing process, such as selecting drawing tools (rectangle, chamfer, offset, line) and placing points in the workspace.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires drawing a tote bag pattern in LibreCAD. Layers: 'STITCH_LINE' (White/7), 'SEAM_ALLOWANCE' (Red/1), 'FOLD_LINE' (Cyan/4). The STITCH_LINE is a 350x400 rectangle with 30mm chamfers on the bottom corners. The SEAM_ALLOWANCE is a 15mm offset outside the STITCH_LINE. The FOLD_LINE is a horizontal line 40mm below the top edge. The file must be saved as tote_bag_pattern.dxf.
